wrench_strike.name: Wrench Strike
wrench_strike.description: Setup/Builder: A solid hit with a heavy wrench. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Tech Pip.

targeted_pheromone.name: Targeted Pheromone
targeted_pheromone.description: Setup: Mark the target for your turrets. Applies [Marked] and generates 1 Tech Pip.

autoturret.name: Auto-Turret Deployment
autoturret.description: Payoff: Deploy an automated sentry. Consumes 5 Tech Pips. Turret attacks the marked target for 20 seconds.

shock_grenade.name: Shock Grenade
shock_grenade.description: Payoff/AOE: Throw a high-voltage grenade. Consumes 3 Tech Pips to deal AOE Physical damage and stun for 2 ticks.

portable_barrier.name: Portable Barrier
portable_barrier.description: Defense: Deploy a hard-light shield. Reduces incoming Physical damage by 60% for 4 ticks.

overdrive.name: Overdrive Protocol
overdrive.description: Defense: Overclock your defenses. Grants [Haste] and 30% Physical mitigation.

jetpack_boost.name: Jetpack Boost
jetpack_boost.description: Mobility: Burst of fire to launch into any connected room.

repair_protocol.name: Repair Protocol
repair_protocol.description: Utility: Execute field repairs. Restores 30% HP to self and any deployed constructs.

engineer_physiology.name: Engineer Physiology
engineer_physiology.description: Passive: Master Architect. Your constructs have 20% increased Health and Attack power.
